{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260322025336F5364D996F18316C2694"}"},"total":1225},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7548057639751385881","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"目前看是一个很好的恐龙生活日常文，也是番茄少有的非人主角，剧情温馨配角描写的很生动，或许有先入为主的感官，小说很有电影氛围。很好的开篇。希望爆更。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1757420432,"group_id":"7539900622603045912","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"初一时兴起，心乐意为之，望有始有终","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N0U24mMeDqTj7oxrc9rmyJ4=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/0497471298804af69ecdcc2bce504238~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776707659&x-signature=P455hJ9z3IJYxlrxFYXpA2rjXyE%3D","user_id":"51142414263","user_name":"赤水侧畔的冬草青杨"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"51142414263","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7539900622603045912","book_info":{"abstract":"【无系统+无女主+不变人+不玄幻+日常】
【侏罗纪公园同人文，后续会连上世界故事篇章】
【索纳岛为故事篇章，因为索纳岛资料较少，所以有不少私设】
【主角是方舟生存进化的棘龙】
身为一条棘龙，我很有自我认知，那就是，我是个捕鱼的。
身为渔夫，就要自知之明，每天抓抓鱼，晒晒太阳，和其他恐龙愉快的相处就行了。
虽然我长得比较畸形，但作为一个棘龙，还是要有自我修养的，打架和嘶杀还是算了吧。
我只是个普普通通的渔夫，没有其他大型兽脚类那样强大的力量。
你问我脚底的霸王龙怎么回事？这只是老朋友之间的互动罢了。

ded_count":0,"listen_duration":1,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":5570,"reply_count":1,"show_pv":29753},"user_action":{"author":0,"author_digg_time":1757420512,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7548311137707082558","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"这本书真的是可以大力推的，属于恐龙中的精品，不像那种其他无脑爽文，首先说明一下，主角是方舟龙，不是侏罗纪公园的那种龙，前期铺垫有点小多，是为了合理的推进到公园一，主角的话就是正常18岁大学生性格，属于偏和平那种，不清楚自身数值强大，后面会稍微转型，总而言之，爱看恐龙文的有福了","text_exts":[{"e":52,"s":49,"text":"侏罗纪","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E4%BE%8F%E7%BD%97%E7%BA%AA&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231774119216316C2694%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227548311137707082558%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227539900622603045912%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E4%BE%8F%E7%BD%97%E7%BA%AA%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1757481857,"group_id":"7539900622603045912","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"只看好书，能进我书架的都是精品","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N7e3Qr8+XVFo/zraVku4LRe3kZddZ9C7AVhBrtoVRrHA","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/e508c1e5fb4a4ace97cadd842ed2e44f~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776702417&x-signature=NVMJCWDD4Ou61LBiEunXFhmRLX8%3D","user_id":"2225858860823118","user_name":"我反手就是一个赞"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2225858860823118","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7539900622603045912","book_info":{"abstract":"【无系统+无女主+不变人+不玄幻+日常】

【索纳岛为故事篇章，因为索纳岛资料较少，所以有不少私设】
【主角是方舟生存进化的棘龙】
身为一条棘龙，我很有自我认知，那就是，我是个捕鱼的。
身为渔夫，就要自知之明，每天抓抓鱼，晒晒太阳，和其他恐龙愉快的相处就行了。
虽然我长得比较畸形，但作为一个棘龙，还是要有自我修养的，打架和嘶杀还是算了吧。
我只是个普普通通的渔夫，没有其他大型兽脚类那样强大的力量。
你问我脚底的霸王龙怎么回事？这只是老朋友之间的互动罢了。
